eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Missouri; at 09:00 AM ON APR 28, 2026 Effective until 09:15 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: THIS IS ONLY A TEST. THE FOLLOWING IS A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST OF THE EMERGENCY ALERT SYSTEM, ORIGINATING FROM THE MISSOURI STATE EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT AGENCY IN JEFFERSON CITY AND COORDINATED WITH THE LOCAL BROADCASTERS IN YOUR COMMUNITY. THIS IS ONLY AT TEST.
